phrases.cultural_note: The museum displays traditional Alsatian costumes, including the distinctive 'coiffe' (headpieces) worn by women in different villages.

responses.english: They are traditional Alsatian costumes. The headpieces vary by village.
responses.french: Ce sont des costumes traditionnels alsaciens. Les coiffes varient selon le village.

phrases.cultural_note: The museum has a modest entrance fee. Reduced rates may be available for students and seniors.

responses.english: It's posted at the ticket office, at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: say ah-fee-SHAY oh gee-SHAY, ah lahn-TRAY
responses.french: C'est affiché au guichet, à l'entrée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an audio guide
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides can enhance the museum experience, especially for non-French speakers.

responses.english: Yes, ask at reception. Available in several languages.
responses.phonetic: wee, duh-mahn-DAY ah lah-KOY. dee-spoh-NEEBL ahn ploo-ZYUR LAHNG
responses.french: Oui, demandez à l'accueil. Disponible en plusieurs langues.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the museum shows about Alsatian life
phrases.text_local: Que montre ce musée sur la vie alsacienne ?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh MON-truh suh moo-ZAY soor lah VEE al-sah-SYEN
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée Alsacien is an ethnographic museum in a series of linked 17th-century townhouses, showing daily life in Alsace from the 16th to 19th centuries.

responses.english: Alsatian folk traditions, costumes and furniture.
responses.phonetic: lay trah-dee-SYON poh-poo-LAIR, kos-TOOM ay moh-BEEL-yay al-sah-SYAN.
responses.french: Les traditions populaires, costumes et mobilier alsaciens.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are English descriptions in the museum
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des explications en anglais dans le musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day zeks-plee-kah-SYON ahn ahn-GLAY dahn luh moo-ZAY

responses.english: Yes, an English booklet is available at reception.
responses.phonetic: wee, uhn lee-VRAY ahn ahn-GLAY ay dees-poh-NEEBL ah lah-KUY.
responses.french: Oui, un livret en anglais est disponible à l'accueil.
